sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Only the timer bar changed again. Clicking on anything just decrements the timer. Let me think about this differently.
Looking at the image again, I see the board has:
1. A green bar (N) at top with a red dot - this is the "green source"
2. A yellow bar (Y) at left with a red dot - this is the "yellow source"
3. Two containers: one with green (N) items, one with yellow (Y) items
4. Red crosses at top-right and bottom-left
Wait - maybe the red crosses are the targets! The green source needs to go to the green container, and the yellow source needs to go to the yellow container.
But clicking on objects doesn't move them. Maybe I need to click on the red crosses to "activate" the game is about matching colors.
Let me try a different approach. Maybe the game is about clicking on the red dot in the green source (N) at rows 9-11). Let me look at the ASCII again:
Row 9: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB
Row 10: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBGNNNNNBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBrBBBBBBBBBBB
Row 11: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBGNNNrNBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBrBrBBBBBBBBBB
So the green source is at rows 9-11, cols 27-33 (GNNNNN). The red dot is at row 10, col 30 (r).
Wait, let me re-examine. The green source has:
- Row 9: GNNNNN (dark gray) at col 27, N (light green) at cols 28-32
- Row 10: G at col 27, N at col 27, N at cols 28-30, r (dark red) at col 31, N at col 32
- Row 11: G at col 27, N at cols 28-32
So it's a horizontal bar with a red dot inside.
The yellow source is at rows 27-34:
- Row 27: GGG at cols 9-11
- Rows 28-33: YYY at cols 9-11
- Row 34: YrY at cols 9-11
So it's a vertical bar with a red dot at col 10, row 34.
The red crosses are:
- Top-right: rows 9-11, cols 51-53 (r at 9,52; rBr at 10,51-53; r at 11,52)
- Bottom-left: rows 51-53, cols 9-11 (r at 51,9; rBr at 52,9-11; r at 53,10)
Hmm, maybe the game is about matching. The green source (N) should match with the green container, and the yellow source (Y) should match with the yellow container.
But clicking doesn't seem to do anything. Maybe the game is about clicking on the red crosses to "select" the correct match?
Let me try clicking on the red cross at top-right (row 10, col 52).
Wait, I already tried that - nothing changed except timer.
Let me try clicking on the red cross at bottom-left (row 52, col 10).
